Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=400}

Run.Text: You'll now see a new window on the bottom right. Remember that we can relocate windows by holding the left mouse button on the window header and dragging.

From the Flight Deck menu, you can see that USS Gallery carries two SH-2F helicopters. Since the ship only has one type of aircraft, it will be selected by default, along with its default ASW loadout of two torpedoes and a 15 sonobuoys.

Assign one helicopter to be launched with an ASW loadout, and then hit the Launch button to begin the process of launching the helicopter. Note that launching aircraft takes time, so be sure to factor this into your actions in combat.
